generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? Countries with mandatory service report 30% lower youth crime rates. A balanced conscription system could strengthen national security while teaching responsibility. Our allies do it - shouldn't we expect the same commitment from our youth? #NationalService #DutyBeforeSelf
